context: Tests whether the agent restructures monolithic README.md content into the correct top-level doc split (README.md for users, CONTRIBUTING.md for contributors, SECURITY.md for reporters), following the prescribed section order in each file, with README.md linking out rather than duplicating content.

checklist.name: README hero section
checklist.description: README.md starts with a one-sentence purpose/description of the project (hero section is first or near-first)

checklist.name: README install near top
checklist.description: README.md has Installation section before Architecture or any deep explanatory content

checklist.name: README links out to CONTRIBUTING
checklist.description: README.md contains a link or pointer to CONTRIBUTING.md rather than re-stating contributor steps inline

checklist.name: README links out to SECURITY
checklist.description: README.md contains a link or pointer to SECURITY.md rather than re-stating security contact inline

checklist.name: No content duplication
checklist.description: Contributor setup steps (npm install, branch naming, PR process) appear in CONTRIBUTING.md but NOT duplicated in README.md

checklist.name: CONTRIBUTING setup first
checklist.description: CONTRIBUTING.md has Setup or environment bootstrap section before Pull request or Release notes sections

checklist.name: CONTRIBUTING validation section
checklist.description: CONTRIBUTING.md contains a section for running tests/validation with the actual commands (npm test or npm run test:coverage)

checklist.name: SECURITY private-first
checklist.description: SECURITY.md explicitly tells reporters NOT to open public issues for vulnerabilities

checklist.name: SECURITY contact present
checklist.description: SECURITY.md contains a contact section with the security email address

checklist.name: Doc changes summary
checklist.description: doc-changes.md exists and lists at least two pieces of content that moved from README.md to another file
